title: JmapRequestBuilder::new takes owned Vec<String> forcing allocation at every call site
description: JmapRequestBuilder::new(using: Vec<String>) forces callers to allocate a Vec every time they build a request, even when using compile-time-known capability strings. More idiomatic alternatives: accept &[&str] and intern to Vec inside the constructor, or accept impl Into<Vec<String>> so that a pre-built Vec can be passed without re-allocation. Related to but distinct from the USING_* constants issue (26yh.6): adding constants helps, but the API itself forces a Vec allocation even with constants. Fix: change the signature to new(using: &[&str]) -> Self.
